title: Enhanced Heart Criticals ❤️
description: Improves combat feedback by spawning additional heart particles on damage and kills.
body:
**❤️ Enhanced Heart Criticals**

Make every hit feel powerful and crystal clear.

Enhanced Heart Criticals improves combat feedback by spawning extra heart particles whenever you damage or kill an entity. No more guessing if your hit registered – you’ll see it instantly.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**✨ Features**

More visible heart particles on hit

Extra burst of hearts on kill

Better clarity during fast fights

Lightweight & vanilla-friendly

Works with melee, projectiles, and more

Fully modded supported

Perfect for PvE, PvP, and modpacks that want stronger visual feedback without changing balance.

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

**🎯 Why?**

Because sometimes in Minecraft you hit something and think:

“Did that even count?”

Now you’ll know.

![hurt](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfe8bbc81cbc47ec6c8a07c70d897014237d6bb3.png)

![killed](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/212728210a43cdde1fc1f8904c7818c2e2756f19.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/527abaedd8b1e2895425af4e85b6aa6c18310531.png)

![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2f981cdb0f9bd8d718bf44ee4eb86d402e673891.png)

This mod have been created with IntelliJ

#AD
